notes.orientation: Standard road pieces are 8x8 m, origin-centered, lanes running along Z (north-south). Rotate 90deg for east-west.
notes.aabb_road: pos (-4, 0, -4) size (8, 0.41, 8) - the 0.41 top is the kerb; asphalt is lower.
notes.motorway: Road_X_2L_1_* and 2L_2_* are 18 m wide 4-lane divided pieces, some with side-junction cutouts.
notes.parking: ParkingRoad_X_1..7 are road-with-parking-lane pieces, some 16 m long, A_3 has perpendicular bays.
notes.medians: RoadMid_1/2/3_A..E are ~3x4 m green median strips with end caps.
notes.themes: Road color themes A, B, C exist for nearly every piece.
